approach: HITL doctrine change — emit verdict and stop at both gates; no self-ratify
F1 doc+recommendation strengthening (spec-layout S1 strongly-recommended, layered discouraged)
F2 new cross-node scenario-overlap detection engine + formation dedup act (spec-level SSA)

why: Op4 corpus partitioning prerequisites F1+F2 (issue #191), HITL doctrine change ratified in-session by the Council. F2 (star): new behavioral node project-spec/scenario-overlap (17 boolean scenarios + 1 @rubric Warden arm) + engine check-scenario-overlap.mts — deterministic cross-node scenario-overlap detection (spec-level SSA): exact-duplicate(blocking, identical normalized step fingerprint across two distinct nodes) / title-overlap(advisory, same title differing steps); fingerprint from step bodies only, cross-node only; the Warden @rubric arm confirms real overlap and assigns one owning node. Dogfood on the live corpus: 0 blocking, 6 advisory coincidental title matches — empirically justifies the severity split (title-overlap would false-block CI if blocking). Wired into the formation loop as a new dedupe act + into sdd-warden. F1: strengthened spec-layout.md S1 default->strongly-recommended, layered/framework-first top level discouraged, false-conflict rate named as partition-quality metric; place-node/start-mission recommendation strengthened; formation gains an advisory layout-quality signal (gates no mission). Formation.feature +5 additive scenarios (addOnly:true confirmed -> self-clears, stays @frozen, no re-open). Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS), independently reproduced the dogfood; one precision nit fixed pre-freeze. Medium blast, HITL doctrine, leash auto-none.
